assertions.title: Streaming responses record non-zero token usage

steps.action: Searched for extractUsageCountsFromSseText tests in src/tests/sse-usage.test.ts
steps.expected: Unit tests exist that verify SSE stream data is parsed for token usage
steps.observed: Found 11 test cases in sse-usage.test.ts covering OpenAI chat completions, Anthropic messages, OpenAI responses API, Ollama, and openai_chat_completions modes

steps.action: Verified test 'extracts usage from OpenAI chat completions SSE stream' parses non-zero tokens
steps.expected: promptTokens=10, completionTokens=5, totalTokens=15 extracted from SSE stream
steps.observed: Test asserts result.promptTokens===10, result.completionTokens===5, result.totalTokens===15 — PASSED

steps.observed: Test asserts result.promptTokens===25, result.completionTokens===12, result.totalTokens===37 — PASSED

steps.observed: Test asserts result.promptTokens===20, result.completionTokens===8, result.totalTokens===28 — PASSED

steps.action: Ran pnpm test (builds + runs all 121 tests)

assertions.title: Non-streaming responses still record token usage correctly

steps.action: Searched for non-streaming usage extraction tests in proxy.test.ts
steps.expected: Unit test exists covering non-streaming JSON response usage extraction
steps.observed: Found test 'persists request logs with usage counts for dashboard surfaces' at line 481 — sends a non-streaming JSON response (content-type: application/json, stream: false) with usage {input_tokens:15, output_tokens:9, total_tokens:24} and asserts the request log entry has promptTokens=15, completionTokens=9, totalTokens=24

steps.action: Verified the extractUsageCounts function handles both streaming and non-streaming paths
steps.expected: Function checks responseIsEventStream() and falls through to JSON parsing for non-streaming
steps.observed: In provider-strategy.ts line 681-704: extractUsageCounts() checks response.ok, then responseIsEventStream() for SSE path, else clones and parses JSON via usageCountsForMode() — both paths tested

steps.expected: All tests pass including non-streaming usage test
steps.observed: 'persists request logs with usage counts for dashboard surfaces' PASSED (20.691618ms). All 121 tests passed.

relevantTests: persists request logs with usage counts for dashboard surfaces

assertions.title: SSE streams without usage data handled gracefully

steps.action: Searched for graceful handling tests in sse-usage.test.ts
steps.expected: Tests exist for SSE streams missing usage data, empty streams, and malformed data
steps.observed: Found 3 graceful-handling tests: (1) 'returns empty object for SSE stream without usage data' — OpenAI stream with no usage chunk, asserts all counts are undefined; (2) 'returns empty object for empty stream text' — empty string input, asserts all counts are undefined; (3) 'returns empty object for malformed SSE data' — garbage input, asserts all counts are undefined

steps.action: Verified test 'returns empty object for SSE stream without usage data'
steps.expected: No error thrown, promptTokens/completionTokens/totalTokens all undefined
steps.observed: Test passes: result.promptTokens===undefined, result.completionTokens===undefined, result.totalTokens===undefined — no crash

steps.action: Verified 'handles Anthropic stream with only message_start usage (no message_delta usage)' edge case
steps.expected: Partial usage data is handled gracefully — promptTokens from message_start, completionTokens=0
steps.observed: Test passes: result.promptTokens===10, result.completionTokens===0, result.totalTokens===10 — partial data handled correctly
All 4 graceful-handling tests passed. All 121 tests passed, 0 failed.

relevantTests: returns empty object for SSE stream without usage data
returns empty object for empty stream text
returns empty object for malformed SSE data
handles Anthropic stream with only message_start usage (no message_delta usage)

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-TOKEN-001 confirmed by 7 SSE streaming usage extraction tests across OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and Responses API modes. VAL-TOKEN-003 confirmed by 1 integration test verifying non-streaming JSON usage extraction persists to request logs. VAL-TOKEN-004 confirmed by 4 graceful-handling tests covering missing usage chunks, empty streams, malformed data, and partial Anthropic usage. All 121 tests passed (pnpm test exit code 0).
